data.title: Gemini Crypto Exchange IPO Pops 14% as Winklevoss Twins Predict $1M Bitcoin
data.description:
The Gemini Crypto Exchange has experienced a remarkable surge in its initial public offering, with its shares rising by an impressive 14%. This spike comes on the heels of bold predictions made by the Winklevoss twins, the co-founders of Gemini, who are projecting that the price of Bitcoin could reach an astounding $1 million in the future. This optimistic outlook and the subsequent positive market response underscore the growing interest and volatility in the cryptocurrency sector.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/09/13/gemini-crypto-exchange-ipo-pops-14-as-winklevoss-twins-predict-usd1m-bitcoin

data.title: Vitalik: Ethereum plans to scale 10 times next year while maintaining decentralization and security
data.description: According to Bitcoin.com, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin, on stage at EthTokyo 2025, reflected on the early days of blockchain, Asia's key role in Ethereum's growth, and his vision for the network's future. His speech, combining history, personal insights, and a future roadmap, emphasized Ethereum's mission to connect Eastern and Western communities. On a technical note, Vitalik Buterin reiterated his unwavering belief in second-layer solutions, which not only improve Ethereum's scalability but also enhance interoperability across ecosystems. He further announced an ambitious goal: Ethereum aims to scale tenfold next year, increasing throughput and accessibility while maintaining decentralization and security. Vitalik Buterin also reflected on the differing dynamics between the Chinese and Japanese developer communities. In China, development is rapid, large-scale, and often associated with large-scale projects. In Japan, developers demonstrate an early adopter attitude towards emerging technologies, often conducting cutting-edge experiments before they become internationally accepted.

data.title: The total market value of stablecoins exceeded US$290 billion, setting a new record high
data.description: The latest data from Coingecko shows that the total market value of stablecoins has exceeded US$290 billion, currently reaching US$292,438,649,465, setting a new historical high. It has increased by 0.5% in the past 24 hours, and the 24-hour trading volume is US$116,829,414,452. Among them, Tether’s market value is approximately US$170.11 billion, ranking first; USDC’s market value is approximately US$72.99 billion, ranking second; USDE’s market value is approximately US$13.32 billion, ranking third.

data.title: Upcoming Central Bank Meetings to Shape Global Economic Outlook
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent moderate inflation reports and a surge in initial unemployment claims have set the stage for a potential 25 basis point rate cut by the Federal Reserve at its September meeting. Concerns over the labor market and prices have led to a drop in U.S. consumer confidence to its lowest level since May, with long-term inflation expectations rising for two consecutive months.

The Federal Reserve is scheduled to hold its policy meeting next week. A 25 basis point rate cut is unlikely to cause significant market fluctuations. If implemented, market participants may quickly shift their focus to U.S. President Donald Trump's news conference and the latest Summary of Economic Projections (SEP), particularly the new "dot plot."

Key events in the upcoming week include:

- Wednesday at 21:45 (UTC+8): Bank of Canada announces its rate decision.

- Thursday at 2:00 (UTC+8): Federal Reserve FOMC releases its rate decision and economic projections.

- Thursday at 2:30 (UTC+8): Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell holds a monetary policy news conference.

- Thursday at 19:00 (UTC+8): Bank of England announces its rate decision and meeting minutes.

- Friday (time to be determined): Bank of Japan announces its rate decision.

- Friday at 14:30 (UTC+8): Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda holds a monetary policy news conference.

data.title: Binance announced that it will open the Binance Alpha airdrop at 22:00 today, with the airdrop threshold being 220 Alpha points.
data.description: Binance has officially announced that it will launch the Binance Alpha airdrop at 22:00 (UTC+8). Users holding at least 200 Binance Alpha Points can claim the tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully redeemed or the event ends. Specific airdrop currencies will be announced later.

data.title: A whale is long BTC, DOGE, and other tokens with high leverage, and its current floating profit exceeds $9 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (0 xebb 2...0 a 03) is using maximum leverage to buy long positions in BTC, DOGE, PEPE, and FARTCOIN, with a current unrealized profit exceeding $9 million. The whale has set take-profit limit orders: 1,250 BTC (worth $145 million) with a take-profit price between $117,000 and $127,000; 75 million DOGE (worth $22.4 million) with a take-profit price between $0.35 and $0.7; 1.5 billion PEPE (worth $18.5 million) with a take-profit price between $0.015 and $0.03; and 20 million FARTCOIN (worth $18.5 million) with a take-profit price between $1.2 and $1.6.

data.title: Figure's Pressure on DeFiLlama Criticized by Blockchain Analyst
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain analyst ZachXBT has criticized Figure, a blockchain lending platform, for exerting public pressure on DeFiLlama. ZachXBT highlighted that Figure is attempting to influence honest participants like DeFiLlama using its RWA metrics, which cannot be fully verified on-chain.

data.title: Circle executives: About 90% of USDC-anchored asset reserves are managed by BlackRock
data.description: According to Caixin, at the Asia Vision Forum 2025 in Singapore, David A. Katz, Vice President of Strategy and Public Policy for Asia Pacific at Circle, the company that issues the USDC stablecoin, stated that cross-border transactions are a key application scenario for stablecoins, and therefore issuing a RMB-denominated stablecoin would help promote the internationalization of the renminbi. Katz emphasized that the issuance of digital assets must meet two core requirements: first, ensuring network security to prevent hacker attacks; and second, that digital assets must be 1:1 anchored to real, high-quality, and highly liquid assets and held in custody by appropriate institutions. Notably, he revealed that approximately 90% of the USDC-backed asset reserves are held by BlackRock.

data.title: Gen Z went online to protest – troops now deployed in Nepal
data.description:
After Nepal’s prime minister abruptly resigned on Tuesday, which collapsed the nation’s government, the military imposed a curfew across Kathmandu, restricted public gatherings, and assumed control of the streets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/gen-z-went-online-to-protest-troops-now-deployed-in-nepal/
